temperature_calibration.label: Temperature Calibration
temperature_calibration.hint: Offset in °C (-2.0 to +2.0). Takes effect on next report.

humidity_calibration.label: Humidity Calibration
humidity_calibration.hint: Offset to adjust humidity readings (-30 to +30).

soil_calibration.label: Soil Moisture Calibration
soil_calibration.hint: Offset to adjust soil moisture readings (-30 to +30).

soil_sampling.label: Soil Sampling Interval
soil_sampling.hint: How often the sensor measures soil moisture (5–3600 seconds). Takes effect on next report.

soil_warning.label: Soil Dryness Threshold
soil_warning.hint: Moisture percentage below which the water shortage alarm triggers (0–100 %).
